form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months ran last of 12 at Armidale Ctry Cl1 on March 29 over 1100m, 14 len behind Mad Harry carrying 62.5kg at $101. Previously second-up got back early 7th of 10 at Canterbury Bm64 on July 9 over 1550m, on heavy track; 10 len behind Centenario with 59kg at $51. Has won second up before but this looks a bit rich.
